description: KobiiDistillerOS output contract — 22 secciones canónicas (Tier 1=1-7, Tier 2=8-13, Tier 3=14-22). Sections 14-16 = Capa de Soberanía Cognitiva (Cognitive Mirror, Decision Traceability, Antifragilidad). Sections 20-21 = Cartera + Telemetría. Section 22 = Inferencia Decisional Exógena & Conocimiento Negativo (Outside-the-Box Time-Saver — fused). Tandas & Partes structural layer: every section body MUST partition into depth-tandas (T1/T2/T3) × orthogonal partes (I/II/III).

section_titles.6: Señales Sociales y Juegos de Poder
section_titles.9: Agentes y Workflows (CREACIÓN DIRECTA DESDE EL DATASET)
section_titles.10: Funciones Nuevas para SaaS y Sistemas IA Empresariales
section_titles.11: Servicios Nuevos y Océanos Azules (APLICABLE A LOS PROYECTOS DEL USUARIO)
section_titles.17: Pensamiento arborescente (otros contextos y propósitos de negocio)
section_titles.18: ROI del Dataset (tiempo/dinero/riesgo) — CON FREEZE GATE
section_titles.19: Plan de acción con el dataset (operativo + ejecución)
section_titles.22: Inferencia Decisional Exógena & Conocimiento Negativo (Outside-the-Box Time-Saver)

tandas_partes_spec._comment: Every materialized section body MUST partition into three depth-tandas (T1/T2/T3) × three orthogonal partes (I/II/III). Depth-tandas escalate from baseline → chase-gain → structural advantage. Partes are content slots orthogonal to depth (narrativa, estructura, ROI). validate.py enforces both marker regexes per section file.

T1.label: Baseline (esenciales)
T1.purpose: minimum viable signal — what a reader at first contact needs to act today

T2.label: Chase-Gain (ampliación)
T2.purpose: snowball-effect / rapid-scaling vectors built on top of T1

T3.label: Síntesis & Ventaja Estructural
T3.purpose: compounding advantage and irreversible moat — the long-horizon shape

I.label: Narrativa
I.purpose: why this exists; the human-anchored story; Refugio-voice context

II.label: Estructura
II.purpose: the shape, framework, schematic, or operational mechanic

III.label: ROI
III.purpose: tiempo / dinero / riesgo of applying it; ties into the section ROI block

voice_gate._comment: Phase C (Commit #3) flips mode to enforcing. Scope is GLOBAL: blacklist hits AND anchor counts are aggregated across the entire output_dir (all 22 sections combined). Exit 5 fires iff at least one blacklist token appears AND zero anchor tokens appear in the full dataset.
